title: Goku Totem
description: A Dragon Ball–inspired Goku Totem of Undying with clean Minecraft-style details.
body: I made a Goku–themed Totem of Undying for Minecraft, inspired by the legendary Dragon Ball character. This custom totem features anime-style details, vibrant colors, and a clean Minecraft look while keeping the vanilla feel. Perfect for Dragon Ball fans who want a powerful and iconic totem design in their world.
